publication_date_hint: Publication dates extracted from page metadata. Consistent monthly release schedule.
subject_period_hint: Subject period is monthly, extracted from filenames. Pattern: 'Daily-discharge-sitrep-monthly-data-webfile-[N]-CSV-[monYY].csv' where N is month number (1-12), monYY is abbreviation + year.
subpage_link_hint: All files are available on the main entry page. No sub-pages required. Files are organized chronologically.

targets.notes: Monthly CSV files with consistent naming pattern. Webfile numbering (1-12) corresponds to calendar month. Latest 2024-2026 data available.
